global_summary: This week demands 103 work-days company-wide, with 21 due by today but only 4 earned so far. Every project missed last week's plan (Jul 13-19), so momentum is thin. Seven sit on serious warning; chase this week's inspections and installs to save them.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: One work-day due this week, none earned yet; slip 57%. Book the final building inspection by Mon Jul 20 to save the week.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Slip 42%: 27 work-days planned this week, just 1 earned of 8 due. Install tiles by Sat Jul 25 and decking by Fri Jul 24.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Slip 79%: 10 work-days planned this week, none of 2 due earned. Install ceiling moulding by Tue Jul 21, then final building inspection by Wed Jul 22.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: On pace this week: 1 of 1 due work-day earned. Next up plumbing trim by Sat Jul 25 and interior doors by Thu Jul 23.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Slip 33%: none of 2 due work-days earned. Set rebar Tue Jul 21, pre-pour inspection Wed Jul 22, then start foundation cure by Fri Jul 24.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Slip 37%: 1 of 3 due work-days earned this week. Install electrical trim by Tue Jul 21 and pass electrical city inspection by Fri Jul 24.

22PGVNmUgLww.text: Slip 21%: none of 1 due work-day earned. Finish doors and windows by Sat Jul 25 and start siding by Thu Jul 23.

22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Behind this week's plan: none of 2 due work-days earned, slip 32%. Energy efficiency report slipped to Mon Jul 27; push rough-in inspections next.

22P2j3sQMKqz.text: On pace this week: 1 of 1 due work-day earned. Take cabinet measurements by Tue Jul 21 and start tiles by Fri Jul 24.
